name: Tech team
blurb: Develops the web platforms, ground control stations, and telemetry systems that interface with our flights.

name: R&D team
blurb: Drives innovation in aerospace science, publishing studies and prototyping advanced propulsion and recovery technologies.

name: Product team
blurb: Coordinates mission timelines, resource allocation, and product lifecycle management for all active builds.

name: Design team
blurb: Handles structural modeling, CAD design, aerodynamic simulations, and CAD reviews for our rockets and rovers.

name: Electronics team
blurb: Builds custom PCBs, sensors, avionics bays, and flight control electronics that power our airborne hardware.

name: Content creation team
blurb: Manages public relations, prints documentation, and produces visual media for events and sponsors.
